revision.comment: sync
change to list markup; stil to be styled
style
tweak CSS
revision.text:
• {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|
  • }}}}{{{2|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
  • }}}}{{{3|}}}

revision.comment: tweak
revision.text:
• {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}|
  • }}}}{{{2|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
  • }}}}{{{3|}}}

revision.comment: style
This needs to return absolutely nothing if the three parameters are missing or blank, and simplify logic
moved [[Template:Br list/sandbox]] to [[Template:Br separated entries/sandbox]]: More accurate name
moved [[Template:Br separated entries/sandbox]] to [[Template:Unbulleted list]]: -
9 items; {{documentation}}
Newline
nowup to 30
Protected Template:Unbulleted list: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
List-style is a compound property; resetting image.
add optional li_style
Add optional ul_style
Expand to 50, per request
add individual list style parameters + format
line-height
{{tfd}}
use class=plainlist
switch to Lua version - now the template can output an unlimited number of links
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:unbulleted list|unbulleted}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Unbulleted list: [[Wikipedia:Lua/Modules|High-risk Lua module]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:unbulleted list|unbulleted}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Removed protection from "[[Template:Unbulleted list]]": fix protection log mistake
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:unbulleted list|unbulleted}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Unbulleted list: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: ~20,000 transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:unbulleted list|unbulleted}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: switch to using [[Module:List]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:list|unbulleted}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: add indentation for continuation lines, requested by [[User:Largoplazo]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:list|unbulleted|item_style=text-indent: -1em; margin-left: 1em;}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
